endpoints.name: Find administrative divisions
endpoints.description:
Find administrative divisions, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you will get back all
known divisions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get administrative division details
endpoints.description:
Get the details for a specific administrative division, including location coordinates, population, and
elevation above sea-level (if available).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{DIVISIONID}} with a real divisionid.

endpoints.name: Find cities near division
endpoints.description:
Find cities near the given administrative division, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you
will get back all known cities.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{DIVISIONID}} with a real divisionid.

endpoints.name: Find divisions near division
endpoints.description:
Find administrative divisions near the given origin division, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria
are set, you will get back all known divisions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{DIVISIONID}} with a real divisionid.

endpoints.name: Find cities
endpoints.description: Find cities, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you will get back all known cities.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get city details
endpoints.description:
Get the details for a specific city, including location coordinates, population, and elevation above sea-level
(if available).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{CITYID}} with a real cityid.

endpoints.name: Get city date-time
endpoints.description: Get city date-time
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{CITYID}} with a real cityid.

endpoints.name: Get city distance
endpoints.description: Get distance from the given city
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{CITYID}} with a real cityid.

endpoints.name: Get city admin region
endpoints.description:
Get the details for the containing populated place (e.g., its county or other administrative division), including location coordinates, population, and elevation above sea-level
(if available).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{CITYID}} with a real cityid.

endpoints.name: Find cities near city
endpoints.description:
Find cities near the given origin city, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you will get
back all known cities.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{CITYID}} with a real cityid.

endpoints.name: Get city time
endpoints.description: Get city time
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{CITYID}} with a real cityid.

endpoints.name: Find countries
endpoints.description: Find countries, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you will get back all known countries.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get country details
endpoints.description: Get the details for a specific country, including number of regions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{COUNTRYID}} with a real countryid.

endpoints.name: Find country regions
endpoints.description:
Get all regions in a specific country. These could be states, provinces, districts, or otherwise major
political divisions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{COUNTRYID}} with a real countryid.

endpoints.name: Get region details
endpoints.description: Get the details of a specific country region, including number of cities.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{COUNTRYID}} with a real countryid. Replace {{REGIONCODE}} with a real regioncode.

endpoints.name: Find country region administrative divisions
endpoints.description:
Get the administrative divisions in a specific country region. The country and region info is omitted in the
response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{COUNTRYID}} with a real countryid. Replace {{REGIONCODE}} with a real regioncode.

endpoints.name: Find country region cities
endpoints.description: Get the cities in a specific country region. The country and region info is omitted in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{COUNTRYID}} with a real countryid. Replace {{REGIONCODE}} with a real regioncode.

endpoints.name: Find cities near location
endpoints.description:
Find cities near the given location, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you will get back
all known cities.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{LOCATIONID}} with a real locationid.

endpoints.name: Find divisions near location
endpoints.description:
Find administrative divisions near the given location, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set,
you will get back all known divisions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{LOCATIONID}} with a real locationid.

endpoints.name: Find currencies
endpoints.description: Find currencies, filtering by optional criteria. If no criteria are set, you will get back all known currencies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get languages
endpoints.description: Get all supported languages
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get locales
endpoints.description: Get all known locales
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get time-zones
endpoints.description: Get all known time-zones
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get time-zone
endpoints.description: Get time-zone
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{ZONEID}} with a real zoneid.

endpoints.name: Get time-zone date-time
endpoints.description: Get time-zone date-time
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{ZONEID}} with a real zoneid.

endpoints.name: Get time-zone time
endpoints.description: Get time-zone time
endpoints.notes: Replace {{MASHAPE_API_KEY}} with your MASHAPE API KEY. Replace {{ZONEID}} with a real zoneid.
